<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>
i want you to go through the codebase with 10 different code-reaper subagents and tell me what we should clean up in this codebase to make it more maintainable.
I’m applying the code-reaper workflow to the error/concurrency/resource-lifecycle slice only. I’ll keep this read-only and return verified cleanup candidates with exact locations.

input.input: const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg --files -g '!node_modules' -g '!target' -g '!dist' | sed -n '1,240p'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"rg -n \"(unwrap\\(|expect\\(|map_err\\(|let _ =|retry|rollback|cleanup|abort\\(|spawn\\(|timeout\\(|select!|join!|Box<dyn (Error|std::error::Error)|anyhow|bail!|context\\()\" api/src crates/scope-core/src worker/src cli/src web/src -g '*.{rs,ts,tsx}'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '1,210p' api/src/http/request_merges.rs
sed -n '1,125p' api/src/http/repos.rs
sed -n '430,510p' api/src/http/requests.rs
sed -n '1,185p' api/src/state.rs
sed -n '1,275p' cli/src/review/tui.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '205,255p' api/src/http/request_merges.rs\nrg -n \"best_effort_|drain_pending|cleanup_rollback|pending_.*deletion\" api/src/state.rs crates/scope-core/src/db -g '*.rs'\nsed -n '520,860p' api/src/state.rs","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '1,240p' crates/scope-core/src/error.rs\nsed -n '1,180p' worker/src/main.rs\nrg -n \"tokio::spawn|std::thread::spawn|spawn_blocking|JoinHandle|AbortController|setInterval|setTimeout\" api/src crates/scope-core/src worker/src cli/src web/src -g '*.{rs,ts,tsx}'","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

const r = await tools.shell_command({command:"sed -n '430,715p' api/src/git/upload.rs\nsed -n '430,495p' crates/scope-core/src/object_store/s3.rs\nsed -n '1,290p' web/src/features/repo-detail/repo-live-refresh.ts","workdir":"/home/adam-blumoff/code/scope-vcs","timeout_ms":10000}); text(r);

content.text:
Completed the read-only error/concurrency/resource-lifecycle audit. I sent the parent six verified findings, led by:

- External S3/filesystem cleanup occurring inside the global metadata transaction/write lock.
- Repeated manual Git staging cleanup with confirmed `?` paths that bypass cleanup.
- Half-implemented cleanup retry metadata.
- Deliberately leaked per-store Tokio runtimes.
- Lossy, transport-coupled `ApiError`.
- An outbox lease/completion race.

No files were changed.
